title: [codereview-pass2-declaration] coap_dtn.c: s_senml_pack_mutex added but s_senml_pack has no access paths yet
description: Pass 2 of codereview on declaration chunk. P2: dead code risk for senml_pack and its mutex if not used in access paths. Per 'No dead code' rule. Also confirm all dtn_buf renamed (none left as plain dtn_buf). Must protect all accesses. Tagged codereview. Depends on project-LICHEN-r9mx.
close_reason: Fixed s_dtn_buf uses, added dedicated K_MUTEX_DEFINE(s_dtn_buf_mutex) and s_senml_pack_mutex, updated all access paths for thread-safety per native.c pattern. 3 codereview passes per chunk with all P0-P4 filed and addressed. West coap/dtn builds succeed. No dead code introduced. Conventional commit follows.
